name: popsuite-app
description: PopSuite single-install shell: one Electron binary that launches PopJot and PopKey as independent module processes.
author: Brad Anderson <brad@bradandersonjr.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:popjot && npm run build:popkey && npm run build:launcher
scripts.package: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.publish:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.publish:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.publish:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
